# GitHub Profile README Generator

> A gorgeous, premium, and free online tool to generate customized profile README files for your GitHub profile page.

## Core Features

- **Profile Essentials**: Custom name, subtitle, bio, and work/learning details. Includes a toggle option to show/hide the profile picture avatar.
- **Tech Stack**: Search and add languages, frameworks, and tools. Renders as scale-interactive brand icons or custom shields.io badges.
- **Social Links**: Connect accounts on GitHub, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Discord, Medium, LeetCode, HackerRank, and more without layout squishing.
- **Projects Showcase**: Fetch active repositories directly via the GitHub API or define custom project cards in a clean layout.
- **Widgets & Stats**: Embed GitHub stats panels, commit streaks, trophies, page view counters, and Twitter follow buttons.
- **Section Alignments**: Left, center, and right alignment options customizable on every page section.
- **Export Controls**: Clean visual document preview matching GitHub's Markdown style, with Copy Code and Download triggers.
- **Themes**: Solid light and dark design themes with a premium minimalist layout.
